name: Telemetry — the AI-native OS (MGN-TEL-001 / ADC-OS-001)
source_documents: OCP Project Deschutes Redfish/AI & Four-Tier Reference v1.2 (PARENT DOC — NOT YET IN REPO, SYS-OI-01)
telemetry_domain: the plane itself — Layers 2–5 over all five domains

parameters.value: L0 physical / L1 device controllers + protection (safety authority) / L2 bridges (the only OT-IT crossing) / L3 Redfish service model / L4 data plane (time-series + MQTT-Sparkplug B) / L5 analytics-ops-compliance (AI engine rule→PID→ML, Grafana, historian, digital twin)
GPU util climbs (t-30s, D2) → coherent ~5 MW step (t0, cause) → BESS +P (t+0–1s, bridge) → gensets ramp (t+1–45s, response) → CDU/TCS ΔT (t+5–120s, follower) — on one clock
1 simulate (mockup, no metal) → 2 bridge cooling → 3 bridge power → 4 correlate on one clock → 5 Tier-1 + external → 6 ML + compliance historian + sample PTE extract

DMTF python-redfish + validators + Mockup Server, OpenBMC ref, pymodbus, opendnp3/libiec61850, pySunSpec2, FastAPI bridges, Node-RED, Mosquitto/Sparkplug B, InfluxDB/TimescaleDB, Grafana, scikit-learn/TF/PyTorch, OTel/Prometheus, Open-Meteo
Purdue-style segmentation; HTTPS + RBAC north-bound; SPDM optional; fail-safe = local control continues, north-bound goes stale — never the reverse
Redfish has no native emissions schema — Oem properties + immutable historian (EMIS-OEM)
